name: Greenfield: Always Latest Stable
description: New projects use the latest stable versions of all tools and dependencies.
content:
## Greenfield Version Policy

- This is a **new project** — always use the latest stable version of the language, runtime, and all dependencies.
- Do not use deprecated APIs, legacy patterns, or compatibility shims.
- Check for newer versions before adding any dependency.
- Minimum version requirements should be set to latest stable at project start.
- No backwards-compatibility code unless there is an explicit, documented reason.
